description: A color photograph with an ICE branding overlay in the lower-left corner. The photo shows a smiling young man with short dark hair and a beard, wearing a gray zip-up hoodie over a black graphic t-shirt, standing with hands behind his back between two officers seen from behind. The left officer wears a tactical vest with 'FBI' in yellow on the back; the right officer wears a vest marked 'POLICE' with an 'AR' patch and a ball cap. A chain-link and white picket fence with trees is in the background. Overlaid graphics: the DHS seal and a white 'ICE' wordmark at lower left, a 'LEARN MORE' button in white on a blue underline, and the URL 'ICE.gov/newsroom' beneath. The faces are not blurred. The tweet text describes a Brazilian national and gang member arrested in Bellingham, Mass., with FBI, DEA, and ATF assistance.
notable_text: ICE; LEARN MORE; ICE.gov/newsroom; FBI; POLICE
